title: Check your answers
description: Check your answers before submitting your claim.

repDetails.howToBeContacted: How would you like us to contact you?
repDetails.contactLanguage: What language do you want us to use when we contact you?
repDetails.hearingLanguage: If a hearing is required, what language do you want to speak at a hearing?
repDetails.hearingPreferences: Can you and the claimant attend hearings by video and phone?
repDetails.disability: Does anyone in the claimant party have a physical, mental or learning disability or health condition that means they need support during the case?

respondentDetails.acasNumber: Do you have an Acas certificate number?

claimDetails.claimTypeDiscrimination: What type of discrimination claim are you making?
claimDetails.claimTypePay: What type of pay claim are you making?
claimDetails.ifClaimSuccessful: What do you want if your claim is successful

submitError: Sorry, we're having technical problems processing your application. Please try again in a few minutes.
